programme.title: My Only U
programme.desc: Toni a wedding planner and perennial bridesmaid, is turning 25 and afraid of becoming an old maid. Photographer Lorenz, a non-marrying kind, arranges blind dates to help her find the right man. Two opposites are drawn to each other and feelings develop. Like magic, they find themselves in each other’s arms.

programme.title: Etiquette For Mistresses
programme.desc: Four seasoned mistresses take a new girl under their wing to teach her the ways of being a kept woman.

programme.title: Ang Tanging Ina Mo (Last na 'to)
programme.desc: A few months after Ina left the position as the President of the Philippines, she is back in the media limelight as she releases a book of her life in her journey as a mother to her children and as a mother to the people of the Philippines. Ina now lives a simple life with her beloved children, together with her long-time best friend, Rowena.
